caption:
Step inside the luxurious Burj Al Arab!

If you’ve always wondered what’s inside the iconic Dubai hotel, this guided tour is for you!

🎟️ AED 249/adult
🕛 90-minute butler-guided tour
⭐️ What to expect:
* Welcome drink
* Arabic hospitality 
* Traditional Arabic coffee and dates
* See the remarkable history of the building in The Experience Suite.
* Exclusive access to The Royal Suite
* Buggy ride to and from Burj Al Arab island

Save this for your next Dubai trip!
